title: radah #7287
definition:
1) to rule, have dominion, dominate, tread down
    1a) (Qal) to have dominion, rule, subjugate
    1b) (Hiphil) to cause to dominate
 2) to scrape out
    2a) (Qal) to scrape, scrape out
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to rule, have dominion, dominate, tread down
    1a) (Qal) to have dominion, rule, subjugate
    1b) (Hiphil) to cause to dominate
 2) to scrape out
    2a) (Qal) to scrape, scrape out

    NASB:  to have dominion, rule, dominate
